title: Senior Teacher - Testbook Capital India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Testbook Capital India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the Testbook Capital India family as a Senior Teacher in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Testbook Capital India:
Testbook Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Testbook Capital India!
